case_title: JIM KHORGE VS. ABRAHAM W HEMPEL et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-17-01 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT #206 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHORGE, JIM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-11-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-17-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
LAW AND MOTION, 301, MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED. REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEMPEL, ABRAHAM W THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 934 SHOTWELL STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. STAY EXECUTION THROUGH 1/1/2002. PLTF. RETAINS SEC. DEP. IF DEFT. VACATES BY 1/1/2002, PLAINTIFF TO VACATE JUDGMENT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES OF DEFENDANT HEMPEL TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HEMPEL, ABRAHAM W HEARING SET FOR DEC-11-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
